docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-29-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SANCHEZ, WILBERT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CORRALES, NOHEL $2,047.24 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,137.24 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,047.24 FILED BY SANCHEZ, WILBERT AS TO DEFENDANT CORRALES, NOHEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-29-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00) SERVED OCT-07-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CORRALES, NOHEL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-29-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-29-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---DYLAN TARNOFF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
